description.en: Top-tier generalist model with excellent reasoning depth, strong coding reliability, and mature agent tooling support.
description.zh-TW: 頂級全能模型，具備出色的推理深度、穩定的程式能力，以及成熟的 agent 工具鏈支援。

strengths.en: Very strong long-horizon task execution
strengths.zh-TW: 長流程任務執行能力非常強

strengths.en: Deep ecosystem integration across tools and APIs
strengths.zh-TW: 工具與 API 生態整合成熟

caveats.en: Premium pricing for heavy batch usage
caveats.zh-TW: 大量批次使用時成本偏高

caveats.en: Fast enough, but not the cheapest latency pick
caveats.zh-TW: 速度夠用，但不是最低延遲與最低成本選擇

description.en: Lean, affordable OpenAI model tuned for responsive assistants, classification, and operational agent tasks.
description.zh-TW: 輕量且價格友善的 OpenAI 模型，適合即時助理、分類與日常 agent 任務。

strengths.en: Excellent throughput-per-dollar
strengths.zh-TW: 單位成本產出效率很高

strengths.en: Strong tool-calling ergonomics
strengths.zh-TW: 工具呼叫體驗成熟穩定

caveats.en: Less depth for frontier-grade reasoning
caveats.zh-TW: 面對最前沿推理任務時深度較不足

caveats.en: May need stronger prompt scaffolding for nuanced analysis
caveats.zh-TW: 做細緻分析時需要更好的提示框架

description.en: Highly trusted reasoning and coding model with exceptional writing quality and calm, consistent outputs.
description.zh-TW: 高信任度的推理與程式模型，寫作品質優秀，輸出穩定且一致性高。

strengths.en: Excellent code edits and technical explanations
strengths.zh-TW: 程式修改與技術解說能力出色

strengths.en: Strong output consistency for editorial workflows
strengths.zh-TW: 在編輯與寫作流程中穩定度高

caveats.en: Tool ecosystem is strong but narrower than the broadest platform stacks
caveats.zh-TW: 工具生態不錯，但仍略窄於最完整的平台型生態

caveats.en: Latency can rise on very long deliberative prompts
caveats.zh-TW: 超長推理提示下延遲可能上升

description.en: Fast and lightweight model ideal for summarization, routing, support tasks, and budget-sensitive assistants.
description.zh-TW: 快速輕量模型，適合摘要、任務路由、客服與成本敏感型助理。

strengths.en: Responsive and economical for high-volume operations
strengths.zh-TW: 高量操作下反應快且成本低

strengths.en: Strong default tone quality for concise outputs
strengths.zh-TW: 簡潔輸出時語氣表現穩定

caveats.en: Limited ceiling for complex multi-step planning
caveats.zh-TW: 複雜多步驟規劃能力上限有限

caveats.en: Less appealing for agent workflows that require richer tool state
caveats.zh-TW: 需要更複雜工具狀態的 agent 流程較不適合

description.en: Powerful multimodal model with strong long-context analysis, research workflows, and broad document understanding.
description.zh-TW: 強大的多模態模型，擅長長上下文分析、研究流程與複雜文件理解。

strengths.en: Outstanding large-document synthesis
strengths.zh-TW: 大型文件整合與歸納能力突出

strengths.en: One of the best multimodal coverage profiles
strengths.zh-TW: 多模態覆蓋面非常完整

caveats.en: UX across endpoints can feel less uniform than the most polished competitors
caveats.zh-TW: 不同端點體驗的一致性略遜於最成熟對手

caveats.en: Not always the fastest interactive pick
caveats.zh-TW: 互動式回應未必是最快選擇

description.en: Low-latency multimodal workhorse for assistant surfaces, routing layers, and lightweight agent execution.
description.zh-TW: 低延遲多模態工作馬，適合助理介面、路由層與輕量 agent 執行。

strengths.en: Excellent latency for multimodal interfaces
strengths.zh-TW: 多模態介面的延遲表現很優秀

strengths.en: Very compelling value for large-scale ingestion
strengths.zh-TW: 大規模資料吞吐時成本效益佳

caveats.en: Reasoning depth trails premium frontier models
caveats.zh-TW: 推理深度仍落後旗艦級模型

caveats.en: May need a higher-tier fallback for sensitive outputs
caveats.zh-TW: 高敏感輸出情境可能需要更高階備援模型

description.en: Strong real-time orientation and increasingly capable reasoning model with distinctive web freshness advantages.
description.zh-TW: 偏向即時資訊場景、推理能力持續增強，且具備新鮮網路資訊優勢的模型。

strengths.en: Useful when freshness matters
strengths.zh-TW: 重視資訊新鮮度時很有價值

strengths.en: Confident long-form synthesis style
strengths.zh-TW: 長文整合輸出風格有辨識度

caveats.en: Ecosystem and enterprise controls still maturing
caveats.zh-TW: 生態與企業級控制面仍在成熟中

caveats.en: Less proven for complex agent loops
caveats.zh-TW: 複雜 agent loop 的實戰驗證較少

description.en: High-value reasoning model that punches above its price tier for technical problem solving and analytical depth.
description.zh-TW: 高性價比推理模型，在技術解題與分析深度上常有超出價格帶的表現。

strengths.en: Very attractive for reasoning-heavy workloads on a budget
strengths.zh-TW: 預算有限時做重推理任務非常划算

strengths.en: Strong analytical style for math and code
strengths.zh-TW: 在數學與程式分析上表現強勢

caveats.en: Latency and ecosystem maturity remain trade-offs
caveats.zh-TW: 延遲與生態成熟度仍是代價

caveats.en: Operational guarantees vary by deployment path
caveats.zh-TW: 不同部署路徑下的穩定性保證不一

description.en: Flexible open-weight option with broad community experimentation and strong customization potential.
description.zh-TW: 彈性高的開放權重模型，社群實驗豐富，客製化潛力強。

strengths.en: Strong fit for teams that need control and self-hosting
strengths.zh-TW: 需要掌控權與自架的團隊會很適合

strengths.en: Community momentum creates many integration paths
strengths.zh-TW: 社群動能帶來豐富整合方式

caveats.en: Production quality depends heavily on deployment discipline
caveats.zh-TW: 正式環境品質非常依賴部署水準

caveats.en: Benchmark strength does not always translate to polished UX
caveats.zh-TW: benchmark 成績不一定等於實際體驗成熟

description.en: Ambitious frontier contender with strong multilingual performance and good enterprise utility across Asian markets.
description.zh-TW: 具競爭力的前沿模型，在多語言尤其亞洲市場企業場景中有不錯表現。

strengths.en: Strong multilingual coverage and pragmatic enterprise fit
strengths.zh-TW: 多語能力強，企業落地實用度高

strengths.en: Balanced performance profile without extreme weaknesses
strengths.zh-TW: 整體表現均衡，沒有明顯短板

caveats.en: Global ecosystem mindshare is still catching up
caveats.zh-TW: 全球生態心智仍在追趕中

caveats.en: Docs and examples can vary by region
caveats.zh-TW: 文件與案例完整度因地區而異

description.en: European flagship model with solid reasoning, concise style, and attractive deployment flexibility.
description.zh-TW: 歐洲旗艦模型，具備紮實推理、精簡風格與靈活部署優勢。

strengths.en: Clean enterprise-friendly posture and deployment options
strengths.zh-TW: 企業友善姿態與部署選項清楚

strengths.en: Good balance between cost and reasoning quality
strengths.zh-TW: 成本與推理品質之間取得不錯平衡

caveats.en: Ecosystem is smaller than the hyperscaler leaders
caveats.zh-TW: 生態規模仍小於超大平台領先者

caveats.en: Less differentiated for multimodal-heavy product surfaces
caveats.zh-TW: 對多模態產品面來說差異化較少

description.en: Enterprise-oriented model with strong retrieval posture, business language handling, and dependable workflow integration.
description.zh-TW: 偏企業導向的模型，適合檢索增強、商務語言處理與穩定工作流整合。

strengths.en: Strong fit for internal knowledge workflows
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合內部知識工作流

strengths.en: Dependable enterprise integration story
strengths.zh-TW: 企業整合敘事穩定可信

caveats.en: Less mindshare in cutting-edge coding circles
caveats.zh-TW: 在最前沿 coding 圈中的心智較弱

caveats.en: Not the most exciting pick for multimodal experiences
caveats.zh-TW: 多模態體驗不是它的主打強項

description.en: Research-first model experience optimized for answer grounding, current web synthesis, and citation-friendly output.
description.zh-TW: 偏研究導向的模型體驗，強調有根據的答案、即時網頁整合與引用友善輸出。

strengths.en: Great for research UX with source visibility
strengths.zh-TW: 研究型體驗下可見來源這點很有優勢

strengths.en: Useful for analyst workflows that need current context
strengths.zh-TW: 需要即時背景的分析流程相當適合

caveats.en: Not a primary choice for tool-heavy coding agents
caveats.zh-TW: 不適合做工具密集的 coding agent 主力

caveats.en: Less control than fully orchestrated platform APIs
caveats.zh-TW: 相比完整平台 API，可控性較低

description.en: Terminal-native coding agent workflow for implementing features, refactors, and technical reviews from a real repo.
description.zh-TW: 終端機原生的 coding agent 工作流，可直接在真實 repo 中完成功能、重構與技術審查。

strengths.en: Excellent for shipping actual code, not just snippets
strengths.zh-TW: 擅長交付真正可執行的程式碼，而不只是片段

strengths.en: Strong fit for agent-orchestrated development loops
strengths.zh-TW: 非常適合 agent 協作式開發流程

caveats.en: Requires a disciplined repo environment and trust boundaries
caveats.zh-TW: 需要乾淨 repo 環境與清楚的信任邊界

caveats.en: Interactive behavior benefits from PTY-capable tooling
caveats.zh-TW: 互動型行為很依賴支援 PTY 的工具環境

description.en: Strong coding and refactor assistant with especially high-quality explanations and calm change planning.
description.zh-TW: 擅長程式與重構的助理，特別強在高品質說明與穩健的變更規劃。

strengths.en: Great at diff-aware edits and review-style feedback
strengths.zh-TW: 很擅長 diff-aware 修改與 review 式回饋

strengths.en: Output quality is especially readable for teams
strengths.zh-TW: 輸出可讀性高，團隊協作很舒服

caveats.en: Tool conventions differ from PTY-first coding agents
caveats.zh-TW: 工具操作習慣與 PTY 型 coding agent 不同

caveats.en: Best performance assumes a clean, well-scoped prompt
caveats.zh-TW: 要發揮最佳效果，提示範圍需要夠清楚

description.en: Graph-based runtime for durable agent workflows, branching logic, and stateful multi-step execution.
description.zh-TW: 圖狀工作流框架，適合有狀態、多分支、可恢復的 agent 執行流程。

strengths.en: Excellent for non-trivial agent state machines
strengths.zh-TW: 處理複雜 agent 狀態機非常好用

strengths.en: Supports inspection and controlled branching
strengths.zh-TW: 方便觀察狀態與控制分支邏輯

caveats.en: More framework overhead than simple workflow tools
caveats.zh-TW: 相較簡單工作流工具，框架負擔較大

caveats.en: Teams need architectural discipline to avoid graph sprawl
caveats.zh-TW: 若缺乏架構紀律，圖會很快失控

description.en: Popular workflow builder for gluing APIs, LLM calls, and back-office tasks into practical automations.
description.zh-TW: 高人氣工作流工具，適合把 API、LLM 呼叫與後台作業串成實用自動化。

strengths.en: Fastest path from idea to automation demo
strengths.zh-TW: 從想法到自動化 demo 的速度很快

strengths.en: Huge connector surface for business operations
strengths.zh-TW: 商務整合連接器非常多

caveats.en: Complex flows can become visually messy
caveats.zh-TW: 複雜流程容易變得視覺上凌亂

caveats.en: Still needs governance when touching sensitive systems
caveats.zh-TW: 碰到敏感系統時仍需要治理與權限控管

description.en: Reliable browser automation layer for agent actions, QA checks, scraping flows, and human-in-the-loop web tasks.
description.zh-TW: 可靠的瀏覽器自動化層，適合 agent 操作、QA 檢查、爬取流程與人機協作網頁任務。

strengths.en: Production-grade browser control with testable steps
strengths.zh-TW: 可測試且偏正式環境的瀏覽器控制能力

strengths.en: Pairs well with agents that need a web actuator
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合當 agent 的網頁操作手腳

caveats.en: Requires careful handling of flaky sites and auth flows
caveats.zh-TW: 面對不穩網站與登入流程時要特別處理

caveats.en: Maintenance cost rises when UI targets change often
caveats.zh-TW: 目標網站 UI 常變時維護成本會升高

description.en: Battle-tested transcription layer for meetings, podcasts, multilingual notes, and voice-driven workflows.
description.zh-TW: 成熟穩定的語音轉文字層，適合會議、Podcast、多語筆記與語音工作流。

strengths.en: Still one of the most dependable transcription building blocks
strengths.zh-TW: 依然是最可靠的轉錄基礎元件之一

strengths.en: Useful across local and API-backed pipelines
strengths.zh-TW: 可同時用於本地與 API 型流程

caveats.en: Not a full audio intelligence stack by itself
caveats.zh-TW: 它本身不是完整音訊 intelligence stack

caveats.en: Post-processing is still needed for polished summaries
caveats.zh-TW: 要做漂亮摘要仍需後處理

description.en: Practical secret access layer for agents and scripts that need secure credential injection without hardcoding.
description.zh-TW: 讓 agent 與腳本安全讀取憑證的實用層，可避免把密鑰寫死在程式裡。

strengths.en: Strong security posture for credential-heavy workflows
strengths.zh-TW: 對憑證密集流程的安全姿態很強

strengths.en: Reduces copy-paste secret sprawl
strengths.zh-TW: 能有效降低祕密資訊到處複製貼上的問題

caveats.en: Onboarding is slower than plain env files
caveats.zh-TW: 上手速度比純 env 檔案慢一些

caveats.en: Desktop integration may be required for a smooth experience
caveats.zh-TW: 順暢體驗通常需要桌面整合

description.en: Vector database and retrieval layer for grounding answers, semantic search, and memory-augmented agents.
description.zh-TW: 向量資料庫與檢索層，適合做答案 grounding、語意搜尋與記憶增強 agent。

strengths.en: Useful backbone for high-recall retrieval systems
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合做高召回檢索系統骨幹

strengths.en: Supports semantic memory architectures cleanly
strengths.zh-TW: 支援語意記憶架構相當自然

caveats.en: Requires ongoing tuning for chunking and ranking quality
caveats.zh-TW: chunking 與排序品質需要持續調校

caveats.en: Infrastructure overhead is non-trivial
caveats.zh-TW: 基礎設施維護成本不低

description.en: Search data API that helps agents gather current web signals with consistent, parseable results.
description.zh-TW: 搜尋資料 API，讓 agent 可以穩定取得最新網路訊號與易解析結果。

strengths.en: Simple way to add current web signals to agents
strengths.zh-TW: 快速幫 agent 補上即時網路資訊

strengths.en: More parseable than raw HTML scraping flows
strengths.zh-TW: 比直接抓 HTML 更容易解析與維護

caveats.en: Search APIs still need ranking logic on top
caveats.zh-TW: 搜尋 API 上層仍需要自行做 ranking 邏輯

caveats.en: Coverage quality depends on the target domain
caveats.zh-TW: 不同領域的覆蓋品質會有差異

description.en: A practical toolbox around the Model Context Protocol for exposing actions, files, and resources to compatible agents.
description.zh-TW: 圍繞 Model Context Protocol 的實用工具組，可把動作、檔案與資源暴露給相容 agent。

strengths.en: Powerful abstraction for standardizing agent tools
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合標準化 agent 工具介面

strengths.en: Helps decouple capabilities from model vendors
strengths.zh-TW: 有助於把能力層從模型供應商中解耦

caveats.en: Protocol maturity and conventions are still evolving
caveats.zh-TW: 協議成熟度與慣例仍在演進

caveats.en: Needs careful permission design
caveats.zh-TW: 權限設計要做得很仔細

description.en: Personal knowledge layer that turns agent memory into editable markdown instead of opaque hidden state.
description.zh-TW: 把 agent 記憶做成可編輯 Markdown，而不是不可見黑盒狀態的個人知識層。

strengths.en: Human-readable memory is easier to trust and audit
strengths.zh-TW: 人類可讀的記憶更容易信任與稽核

strengths.en: Pairs well with assistant continuity workflows
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合有持續上下文需求的助理流程

caveats.en: Manual curation is still needed for quality
caveats.zh-TW: 品質仍需要人工整理與維護

caveats.en: Not a substitute for robust retrieval design at scale
caveats.zh-TW: 無法完全取代大規模檢索設計

description.en: Fast path to business automation through prebuilt actions across SaaS tools and operational systems.
description.zh-TW: 透過大量 SaaS 預建動作，快速把商務系統串成 AI 自動化流程。

strengths.en: Very quick to demo high-value business flows
strengths.zh-TW: 很快就能 demo 出高價值商務流程

strengths.en: Broad integration surface reduces engineering overhead
strengths.zh-TW: 整合面廣，可降低工程負擔

caveats.en: Custom logic can hit platform limits quickly
caveats.zh-TW: 遇到客製化邏輯時很快會碰到平台限制

caveats.en: Costs can stack once usage scales
caveats.zh-TW: 規模化後費用容易疊高

description.en: Safe-ish ephemeral execution environment for agent-generated code, notebooks, and dynamic analysis tasks.
description.zh-TW: 提供臨時執行環境，適合 agent 產生的程式、notebook 與動態分析任務。

strengths.en: Improves safety posture for generated-code execution
strengths.zh-TW: 能改善執行生成程式碼時的安全姿態

strengths.en: Helpful for notebook and experiment workflows
strengths.zh-TW: 對 notebook 與實驗流程很有幫助

caveats.en: Still requires policy design and runtime controls
caveats.zh-TW: 仍然需要政策設計與執行環境控管

caveats.en: Cold-start and environment setup can affect UX
caveats.zh-TW: 冷啟動與環境設定可能影響體驗

title.zh-TW: Coding 助理與 repo 執行

strapline.en: When shipping working code matters more than flashy demos.
strapline.zh-TW: 當重點是交付真正能跑的程式，而不是好看的 demo。

summary.en: Prioritize reliability, diff quality, tool-calling control, and the ability to maintain focus across multi-file edits.
summary.zh-TW: 重點放在可靠性、diff 品質、工具呼叫控制，以及跨多檔案編修時的持續專注能力。

evaluationLens.zh-TW: 程式修改精準度與可回退性
在真實 repo 內的工具操作體驗
在反覆修正/建置/測試循環中的延遲表現

title.zh-TW: 研究整合與分析師工作流

strapline.en: For evidence gathering, market scans, and long-context synthesis.
strapline.zh-TW: 適合做證據蒐集、市場掃描與長上下文整合。

summary.en: Prioritize source grounding, multilingual reading, long-context reasoning, and a retrieval stack that stays inspectable.
summary.zh-TW: 重視來源根據、多語閱讀、長上下文推理，以及可檢視的檢索架構。

evaluationLens.zh-TW: 來源可見性與證據可追溯性

evaluationLens.en: How well the stack supports repeatable analyst workflows
evaluationLens.zh-TW: 是否支援可重複執行的分析流程

title.zh-TW: Agent 自動化與營運流程

strapline.en: For teams that need models to trigger, coordinate, and complete operational work.
strapline.zh-TW: 適合需要讓模型實際觸發、協調並完成營運工作的團隊。

summary.en: Prioritize tool reliability, composability, secret handling, and robust state management across long-running flows.
summary.zh-TW: 重視工具可靠性、可組合性、憑證安全，以及長流程中的狀態管理能力。

evaluationLens.en: Can the model survive tool-rich workflows?
evaluationLens.zh-TW: 模型能否撐住工具密集型流程？

evaluationLens.en: Are the surrounding skills secure and auditable?
evaluationLens.zh-TW: 周邊技能是否安全且可稽核？

evaluationLens.en: Is the workflow resilient under retries and branching?
evaluationLens.zh-TW: 面對重試與分支時，流程是否足夠韌性？
